title: Greece — Declaration of Commencement of Business Activity (Form Δ211), Natural-Person & Entity-Under-Formation Pathway
description: AADE's (Independent Authority for Public Revenue) unified Tax Registry form Δ211, "Δήλωση έναρξης, μεταβολής, διακοπής εργασιών επιχείρησης" (Declaration of Commencement/Modification/Cessation of Business Activity), v0.3 edition dated 06/22. Δ211 is a single composite form serving four filer categories (natural person; legal person/entity; founder of an entity-under-formation; any of these ceasing activity) across three actions (commencement, modification, cessation), routed via the form's own section-selection table (page 2). This is Greece's functional equivalent of a business-formation filing: the newer ΓΕΜΗ e-one-stop-shop (eyms.businessportal.gr) is fully myAADE/taxisnet-SSO-gated for the incorporation step itself, so Δ211 is the mineable, unauthenticated artifact that opens this vertical. This v1.0.0 scopes to the COMMENCEMENT (Έναρξη) action only, for the two pathways that begin a new registration: (A) a natural person commencing business (sections 1, 2, 3 [excl. 3.4-3.7], 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 10, 11), and (C) the founder of an entity-under-formation commencing/modifying the formation process (sections 1, 2, 8, 13). Path B (an already-existing legal person/entity, sections 3 [all], 9, 12) and all Μεταβολή (modification)/Διακοπή (cessation) fields (including all of section 14) are out of scope for this version — see VERIFICATION.md for the full disclosure and future-version candidates. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Greece or AADE.

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-3036, picking up GOV-3030 (a pre-scouted candidate from GOV-3026's scouting pass), children of the standing research routine (GOV-2167). Opens Greece's Business Formation vertical (now 4 of 6; Greece already has DMV via gr/yme, Taxes via gr/aade Ε1/Ε2/Ε3, and Visa via gr/mfa). The direct aade.gr URL 403s to non-browser fetches (Akamai-gated, consistent with this registry's established pattern for Greek government hosts); the Athens Chamber of Commerce (ACCI) mirror at acci.gr was independently re-fetched this cycle via curl: HTTP 200, Content-Type application/pdf, 478,029 bytes — matching the pre-scouted figure exactly. sha256 computed independently this cycle: 5acd0e9902cde3a3cadf7fb9a9ca2ee62c8d936c3bfc7882bb7e2e545e050ffa (this exact hash was not previously cited in the scouting note, so it stands as this schema's own independently-derived record). Parsed with pdfjs-dist@3 (legacy build): getDocument().numPages confirmed 18 pages; getFieldObjects() confirmed 268 named AcroForm field entries; per-page getAnnotations() confirmed 339 total Widget annotations across pages 3-16 (pages 1-2, 17-18 are instructional/reference text with zero widgets) — both figures independently reproduced and matching the pre-scouted '268-field AcroForm, 18 pages' claim. Page 2's own section-routing table was read directly from the position-sorted text layer (not assumed) to derive the four filer-category x section mapping that drives this schema's scope decision and its requiredWhen/visibleWhen conditions. Scope: commencement (Έναρξη) action only, natural-person pathway (A) and entity-under-formation founder pathway (C) — see the schema description and field-level notes for the exclusion list (path B legal-entity-only fields 3.4-3.7 and section 9 Members and section 12 Foreign Business Seat; all Μεταβολή/Διακοπή-only fields 3.15, 3.16, 13.5, and all of section 14; service-only fields 1.4 Ημερομηνία Δήλωσης and 1.5 Αριθμός Δήλωσης, populated by the tax administration rather than the filer). Two large closed-vocabulary code lists printed on the form's own instructions pages (p.17: ~40 Προέλευση Έναρξης origin codes and ~130 Μορφή Μη Φυσικού Προσώπου legal-form codes; p.18: ~150 Είδος Σχέσης relationship-type codes and ~35 Είδος Εγκατάστασης establishment-type codes) are modeled as free strings with a sourceRef to the instructions page rather than fully enumerated, consistent with this registry's practice of not enumerating large external/legal-basis code lists inline (cf. mainActivityCode's ΚΑΔ lookup, an external AADE spreadsheet not printed on the form at all). Two genuinely large bounded-repeating groups (section 7's 11 secondary-activity slots, and section 10's own nested 5 secondary-activity slots) are capped: section 7 (top-level activities) is capped at 5 of its 11 source slots — sufficient for the large majority of real filings — per this registry's established large-repeating-group convention (cf. si/ajpes's stock-schedule cap, GOV-2910); section 10's own secondary-activity block only has 5 source slots so no cap was needed there. Section 8 (representation) and section 10/11 (domestic/foreign establishment) are each single-slot in the source form itself (the form's own note instructs filing a second Δ211 declaration for additional representatives, domestic establishments, or activities beyond the modeled slots).

fields.name: action
fields.label: Ενέργεια (Action)
fields.description: The action this filing performs. The source form supports Έναρξη (commencement), Μεταβολή (modification), and Διακοπή (cessation) as a single composite filing; this v1.0.0 scopes to the commencement/registration pathway only (per this registry's established composite-filing convention of bounding scope to one pathway per version), so the only in-scope value is Έναρξη. See VERIFICATION.md for the full disclosure of out-of-scope Μεταβολή/Διακοπή fields.

fields.name: taxpayerStatus
fields.label: Ιδιότητα Φορολογούμενου (Taxpayer capacity)
fields.description: Whether the filer is a natural person commencing a business, or the founder of an entity-under-formation (Υπό ίδρυση Επιχείρηση) commencing/modifying/ceasing the formation process. The source form also supports 'Νομικό πρόσωπο ή Νομική οντότητα' (an already-existing legal person/entity) as a third value, out of scope for this v1.0.0 — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: actionDate
fields.label: Ημερομηνία (Date of commencement)
fields.description: The effective date of commencement, corresponding to the selected action.

fields.name: taxpayerTin
fields.label: ΑΦΜ (Taxpayer Identification Number) — filer
fields.description: The filer's 9-digit Greek Tax Identification Number (ΑΦΜ).

fields.name: taxpayerSurname
fields.label: Επώνυμο (Surname) — filer
fields.description: The filer's surname. If a second surname exists, both are recorded in the order shown on the identity document.

fields.name: businessName
fields.label: Επωνυμία (Business name)
fields.description: The registered or proposed trading name. Populated primarily by legal-person filers (out of scope for this v1.0.0); left optional here since an entity-under-formation founder may already have a proposed name.

fields.name: commercialTitle
fields.label: Εμπορικός Τίτλος Επιχείρησης (Commercial title)
fields.description: Recorded only once a ΓΕΜΗ (General Commercial Registry) number has been assigned.

fields.name: commencementOrigin
fields.label: Προέλευση Έναρξης (Origin of commencement)
fields.description: A closed vocabulary of ~40 origin codes is printed in the form's own instructions (p.17), e.g. ΠΡΩΤΗ ΕΝΑΡΞΗ (first commencement), ΑΠΟ ΙΔΡΥΣΗ (from formation), ΜΕΤΑΤΑΞΗ ΑΠΟ ΚΑΘΕΣΤΩΣ ΑΓΡΟΤΩΝ, etc. Modeled as free string rather than a full enum since several values are jurisdiction-specific legal-basis citations better treated as an open, source-cited vocabulary — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: modeContinuous
fields.label: Τρόπος Άσκησης — Συνέχεια (Continuous)
fields.description: Independent checkbox; combinable with the other modeX flags below.

fields.name: fiscalYearEnd
fields.label: Ημερομηνία Λήξης Φορολογικού Έτους (Fiscal year end)
fields.description: Always 31/12 for single-entry books; 31/12 or 30/06 (or another date if a foreign company holds ≥50%) for double-entry books.

fields.name: firstFiscalYearEnd
fields.label: Ημερομηνία Λήξης 1ου Φορολογικού Έτους (First fiscal year end)
fields.description: Required only when double-entry (Διπλογραφικά) books are selected.

fields.name: taxRegimeMode
fields.label: Τρόπος Ένταξης — Λογιστικά Πρότυπα (Accounting-standards enrollment mode)

fields.name: vatSubject
fields.label: Υπαγωγή ΦΠΑ (Subject to VAT)
fields.description: Even when the activity is not itself subject to VAT, the source instructs selecting Ναι (Yes) here and Απαλλασσομένων (exempt) under vatRegimeExempt.

fields.name: vatRegimeNormal
fields.label: Καθεστώς ΦΠΑ — Κανονικό (Normal)
fields.description: Independent checkbox; more than one VAT regime may be combined where the activities require it.

fields.name: vatRegimeExempt
fields.label: Καθεστώς ΦΠΑ — Απαλλασσομένων (Exempt)
fields.description: Independent checkbox; more than one VAT regime may be combined where the activities require it.

fields.name: vatRegimeExemptSmallBusiness
fields.label: Καθεστώς ΦΠΑ — Απαλλασσομένων Μικρών Επιχειρήσεων (Small-business exempt)
fields.description: Independent checkbox; more than one VAT regime may be combined where the activities require it.

fields.name: vatRegimeExemptIndustrializedTobacco
fields.label: Καθεστώς ΦΠΑ — Απαλλασσομένων Βιομηχανοποιημένων Καπνών (Industrialized-tobacco exempt)
fields.description: Independent checkbox; more than one VAT regime may be combined where the activities require it.

fields.name: vatRegimeTravelAgency
fields.label: Καθεστώς ΦΠΑ — Πρακτορείο Ταξιδίων (Travel agency)
fields.description: Independent checkbox; more than one VAT regime may be combined where the activities require it.

fields.name: vatRegimeFarmers
fields.label: Καθεστώς ΦΠΑ — Αγροτών (Farmers)
fields.description: Independent checkbox; more than one VAT regime may be combined where the activities require it.

fields.name: vatRegimeArticle40
fields.label: Καθεστώς ΦΠΑ — Άρθρου 40 Ν. 2859/2000
fields.description: Independent checkbox; more than one VAT regime may be combined where the activities require it.

fields.name: vatRegimeArticle45
fields.label: Καθεστώς ΦΠΑ — Άρθρου 45 Ν. 2859/2000
fields.description: Independent checkbox; more than one VAT regime may be combined where the activities require it.

fields.name: vatRegimeArticle46
fields.label: Καθεστώς ΦΠΑ — Άρθρου 46 Ν. 2859/2000
fields.description: Independent checkbox; more than one VAT regime may be combined where the activities require it.

fields.name: intraCommunityNone
fields.label: Ενδοκοινοτικές Συναλλαγές — Δεν ασκεί (None)
fields.description: Independent checkbox; combinable.

fields.name: intraCommunityAcquisitions
fields.label: Ενδοκοινοτικές Συναλλαγές — Αποκτήσεις (Acquisitions)
fields.description: Independent checkbox; combinable.

fields.name: intraCommunityDeliveries
fields.label: Ενδοκοινοτικές Συναλλαγές — Παραδόσεις (Deliveries)
fields.description: Independent checkbox; combinable.

fields.name: intraCommunityServicesSupplied
fields.label: Ενδοκοινοτικές Συναλλαγές — Παροχή Υπηρεσιών (Services supplied)
fields.description: Independent checkbox; combinable.

fields.name: intraCommunityServicesReceived
fields.label: Ενδοκοινοτικές Συναλλαγές — Λήψη Υπηρεσιών (Services received)
fields.description: Independent checkbox; combinable.

fields.name: mainActivityCode
fields.label: Κωδικός Κύριας Δραστηριότητας (Main activity code)
fields.description: The applicable business-activity code (ΚΑΔ), looked up from AADE's own external nomenclature spreadsheet rather than enumerated on the form itself.

fields.name: representative1RelationshipType
fields.label: Εκπρόσωπος Α — Είδος Σχέσης
fields.description: An extensive closed vocabulary of relationship/capacity types is printed on the form's own instructions page (p.18) — e.g. ΝΟΜΙΜΟΣ ΕΚΠΡΟΣΩΠΟΣ (legal representative), ΔΙΑΧΕΙΡΙΣΤΗΣ (manager), ΚΗΔΕΜΟΝΑΣ (guardian). Modeled as free string given the list's size (~150 entries) rather than a full enum.

fields.name: representative1IssuingAuthority
fields.label: Εκπρόσωπος Α — Εκδούσα Αρχή Αποδεικτικού Εγγράφου

fields.name: representative2RelationshipType
fields.label: Εκπρόσωπος Β — Είδος Σχέσης
fields.description: An extensive closed vocabulary of relationship/capacity types is printed on the form's own instructions page (p.18) — e.g. ΝΟΜΙΜΟΣ ΕΚΠΡΟΣΩΠΟΣ (legal representative), ΔΙΑΧΕΙΡΙΣΤΗΣ (manager), ΚΗΔΕΜΟΝΑΣ (guardian). Modeled as free string given the list's size (~150 entries) rather than a full enum.

fields.name: representative2IssuingAuthority
fields.label: Εκπρόσωπος Β — Εκδούσα Αρχή Αποδεικτικού Εγγράφου

fields.name: establishmentSerialNumber
fields.label: Α/Α Εγκατάστασης (Establishment serial number)
fields.description: Service-assigned on new establishments; only required by the applicant when modifying/ceasing an existing one (out of scope for this v1.0.0).

fields.name: establishmentType
fields.label: Είδος Εγκατάστασης (Establishment type)
fields.description: A closed vocabulary of establishment-type codes is printed on the form's own instructions page (p.18) — e.g. ΚΑΤΑΣΤΗΜΑ (store), ΓΡΑΦΕΙΟ (office), ΕΡΓΑΣΤΗΡΙΟ (workshop). Modeled as free string given the list's size.

fields.name: establishmentModeShopInShop
fields.label: Τρόπος Άσκησης Εγκατάστασης — Shop in Shop

fields.name: foundingLegalForm
fields.label: Μορφή Μη Φυσικού Προσώπου (Legal form of the entity under formation)
fields.description: A closed vocabulary of ~130 legal-form codes is printed on the form's own instructions page (p.17) — e.g. ΑΕ (Société Anonyme), ΕΠΕ, ΙΚΕ, ΟΕ, ΕΕ. Modeled as free string given the list's size.

fields.name: foundingIntraCommunityServicesSupplied
fields.label: Ενδοκοινοτικές Συναλλαγές (Υπό Ίδρυση) — Παροχή Υπηρεσιών (Services supplied)

fields.name: foundingIntraCommunityServicesReceived
fields.label: Ενδοκοινοτικές Συναλλαγές (Υπό Ίδρυση) — Λήψη Υπηρεσιών (Services received)

documents.label: Υπογραφή της Δήλωσης (Signature of the declaration)
documents.statement: Η δήλωση υπογράφεται από τον υπόχρεο (ή τον νόμιμο εκπρόσωπό του) μόνο στην περίπτωση έντυπης υποβολής· η ψηφιακή υποβολή μέσω της εφαρμογής «Τα Αιτήματά μου» της ΑΑΔΕ δεν απαιτεί εκτύπωση ή φυσική υπογραφή.
